e2adbca439405ec9e609ded119e2a576.d41d8cd.message:
XFAIL VULNERABILITY: X-Frame-Options header is absent on all responses — the site can be embedded in a malicious iframe enabling clickjacking attacks against authenticated users (e.g. one-click purchase fraud)

AssertionError: X-Frame-Options missing or weak: '' — set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN to prevent iframe embedding
assert '' in ('DENY', 'SAMEORIGIN')
 +  where '' = <built-in method upper of str object at 0x7fd5aca225d0>()
 +    where <built-in method upper of str object at 0x7fd5aca225d0> = ''.upper
e2adbca439405ec9e609ded119e2a576.d41d8cd.trace:
self = <test_pentest.TestPentestFindings object at 0x7fd5a80a7bf0>
session = <services.rest_client.RestClient object at 0x7fd5a204bf20>
api_base_url = 'https://tutorialsninja.com/demo'

    @allure.title(
        "FINDING: X-Frame-Options header is present to prevent clickjacking"
    )
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    @pytest.mark.xfail(
        strict=False,
        reason=(
            "VULNERABILITY: X-Frame-Options header is absent on all responses — "
            "the site can be embedded in a malicious iframe enabling clickjacking "
            "attacks against authenticated users (e.g. one-click purchase fraud)"
        ),
    )
    def test_x_frame_options_header_present_to_prevent_clickjacking(
        self, session, api_base_url: str
    ):
        with allure.step("GET login page and inspect X-Frame-Options response header"):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: GET account/login and check X-Frame-Options header"
            )
            resp = session.get(_url(api_base_url, _LOGIN_ROUTE))
    
        with allure.step("Assert X-Frame-Options is set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN"):
            LOGGER.info(
                "Step: Assert X-Frame-Options present; got: %r",
                resp.headers.get("X-Frame-Options", "NOT PRESENT"),
            )
            xfo = resp.headers.get("X-Frame-Options", "")
>           assert xfo.upper() in ("DENY", "SAMEORIGIN"), (
                f"X-Frame-Options missing or weak: {xfo!r} — "
                "set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN to prevent iframe embedding"
            )
E           AssertionError: X-Frame-Options missing or weak: '' — set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN to prevent iframe embedding
E           assert '' in ('DENY', 'SAMEORIGIN')
E            +  where '' = <built-in method upper of str object at 0x7fd5aca225d0>()
E            +    where <built-in method upper of str object at 0x7fd5aca225d0> = ''.upper
